title: ExternalAssetPackage
description: Schema for .meta.json files describing an external asset package (source file + import settings + derived sub-assets).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Strings (e.g. '1.0.0') for hand-authored .meta.json; integers (1, 2, ...) for importer-emitted .meta.json (forgeax-engine-console-asset import writes schemaVersion: 1 as the wire format SSOT, GltfMetaJson literal type).

kind.description: Discriminator for the external asset package type.

importer.description: Open importer key (feat-20260603-asset-import-loader-injection M2): the @forgeax/engine-import runner dispatches the sidecar to the Importer registered under this key. Replaces the former closed `assetType` enum (one-cut migration, no shim). Known keys: 'image' (engine-image importer, single-image source), 'gltf' (engine-gltf importer, .gltf/.glb source), 'audio' (engine-audio-webaudio import path), 'font' (engine-font bake path), and the reserved 'shader' key consumed by engine-vite-plugin-shader's orthogonal transform pipeline (the import runner explicitly skips it). Adding a new importer needs only a registered Importer under a new key - no schema enum edit. Orthogonal to subAssets[].kind which identifies per-sub-asset payload kind.

source.description: Relative path to the source file from the directory containing this .meta.json.

importSettings.description: Importer-specific settings (compression, mipmap, etc.). Free-form object.

paramSchema.description: Material-shader parameter schema (feat-20260528-material-shader-registration-unification). Only valid when importer is 'shader'. Each entry has name (string) and type (string) with an optional default.

subAssets.description: Derived sub-assets extracted from the source file.

guid.description: RFC 4122 36-char dash-form UUID identifying this sub-asset.

sourceIndex.description: Zero-based index into the source file's exported objects.

name.description: Optional display-friendly name for this sub-asset. Copied from the source (e.g. glTF image.name / mesh.name) so the sidecar is human-inspectable. Has no runtime semantic weight.

kind.description: Closed sub-asset kind enum. 'texture' (engine-gltf importer emits per glTF images[] row as TextureAsset POD; feat-20260608 M3). 'mesh' / 'material' / 'scene' (hello-gltf Tier-B set forgeax-engine-console-asset import emits) + 'image' (engine-image emits per *.meta.json sidecar; feat-20260517-vite-plugin-image-build-time-cook M1 w3 added the literal so the catalog builder's image arm can read scanner output) + 'cube-texture' (engine-image emits for HDR equirect sources via assetType='image' arm with importSettings.kind='cube-texture' carrying equirectFaceSize + specularMipLevels; feat-20260520-skylight-ibl-cubemap M5 routes IBL HDR cubemap through the image importer family rather than introducing a third assetType enum value) + 'audio' (engine-audio-webaudio import path, plain AudioBuffer sub-asset with no sidecar metadata; feat-20260527-audio-system M4 w32) + 'font' (engine-font bake path; the FontAsset glyph-metrics sub-asset baked from a TTF source alongside its 'image' atlas sub-asset; feat-20260531-world-space-msdf-text-rendering M5 / w22). Adding a new kind requires (a) a feat-* loop, (b) updating @forgeax/engine-types AssetUnion + the relevant importer pipeline, and (c) extending this enum.
